Comment: inspect running docker containers and env without compose

commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'echo DOCKER_PS && docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}	{{.Image}}	{{.Status}}" && echo RESULTS_API_MATCH && cid=$(docker ps --filter name=results-api --format "{{.ID}}" | head -n 1) && echo CID=$cid && docker inspect $cid --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" | sort'
